summary: Completed comprehensive testing of IoT Dashboard refactoring. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified working - Export button with dialog, period/format selectors, tabs navigation, KPI cards, gauge widgets, and SensorChart component.
critical_code_review_comments: SensorChart uses type='monotone' for smooth spline curve as requested
Export endpoint /api/sensors/export/readings supports CSV and XLSX formats
Export supports periods: 1 day (24h), 7 days, 30 days, 90 days (3 months), 180 days (6 months)
Y-axis has 15% margin calculation in SensorChart
Reference lines for min/max thresholds (red dashed) and current value (gray) implemented
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Using existing sensor 'temp petrin' (TEMPERATURE type) - no readings data available
context_for_next_testing_agent: IoT Dashboard refactoring fully tested. Key features verified: 1) Export button opens dialog with period selector (24h, 7j, 30j, 3mois, 6mois) and format selector (CSV, XLSX), 2) Backend /api/sensors/export/readings returns valid CSV/XLSX files, 3) Three tabs working: Vue d'ensemble, Groupes par Type, Groupes par Localisation, 4) Time range selector (1h-7j) updates dashboard data, 5) KPI cards display: Capteurs Actifs, Alertes Actives, Température Moyenne, Puissance Totale, 6) SensorChart component uses monotone curve type for smooth spline, 7) Gauge widgets display current sensor values. Note: No sensor readings data exists so charts show 'Aucune donnée disponible'.

export_button.test: Verify Export button in top right of IoT Dashboard
export_button.evidence: Button with data-testid='export-global-btn' found and clickable

export_dialog.test: Verify export dialog opens with period and format selectors
export_dialog.evidence: Dialog shows 'Exporter les données' title with period dropdown (5 options) and format dropdown (CSV, XLSX)

export_period_options.evidence: All 5 period options visible in dropdown: Dernières 24 heures, 7 derniers jours, 30 derniers jours, 3 derniers mois, 6 derniers mois

export_format_options.evidence: Both CSV and Excel (XLSX) options visible in format dropdown

api_export_csv.evidence: API returns CSV with headers: Date/Heure, Capteur, Type, Valeur, Unité, Emplacement

api_export_xlsx.evidence: API returns valid XLSX file (5KB, starts with PK ZIP signature)

tabs_navigation.test: Verify three tabs: Vue d'ensemble, Groupes par Type, Groupes par Localisation
tabs_navigation.evidence: All tabs clickable with data-testid attributes, content changes correctly

time_range_selector.test: Verify time range selector with options 1h, 2h, 4h, 8h, 24h, 7j
time_range_selector.evidence: Selector found with data-testid='time-range-select', value changes trigger data reload

kpi_cards.evidence: 4 cards found: Capteurs Actifs (1), Alertes Actives (0), Température Moyenne (--), Puissance Totale (--)

sensor_chart_spline.test: Verify SensorChart uses monotone curve type
sensor_chart_spline.evidence: Code review confirms Line component uses type='monotone' for smooth spline

groups_by_type.evidence: API returns groups with type, type_label, sensors, count, avg/min/max values

groups_by_location.evidence: API returns groups with location_id, location_name, sensors, count, alerts_active

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/iot_dashboard_full.png - IoT Dashboard overview with all elements
.screenshots/export_dialog.png - Export dialog with period selector open
.screenshots/export_format_dropdown.png - Format dropdown showing CSV and XLSX
.screenshots/tab_groups_type.png - Groupes par Type tab with temperature group
.screenshots/tab_groups_location.png - Groupes par Localisation tab with bar chart
.screenshots/tab_overview_final.png - Vue d'ensemble tab with KPIs and gauge
